scripts.generate: pnpm --filter @queuefree/api openapi:generate && pnpm exec openapi-typescript ../../services/api/openapi/openapi.json -o src/generated/schema.d.ts
scripts.lint: echo "@queuefree/api-client lint will be added in a later batch"
scripts.test: echo "@queuefree/api-client tests will be added in a later batch"
